label: Strategy Classification
definition: Categorization of an entity's business strategy or IS buyer decision framework

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Expert prediction about market growth or technology adoption

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Verified historical outcome for an entity (e.g. acquisition or bankruptcy)

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a technology's maturity or fitness for enterprise deployment

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Quantitative comparison against peers or standards

label: Framework Factor
definition: One component of a multi-factor analytical framework (service categories or provider types)

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative market statistic or pricing datum

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Qualitative professional judgment from Aberdeen analyst or surveyed IS executive

label: Industry Analysis
definition: Systematic analysis of industry structure and dynamics

label: Competitive Profiling
definition: Detailed comparison of competing vendor service offerings

label: Benchmarking
definition: Comparison against industry standards or peers

label: Field Research
definition: Primary data collection via IS buyer interviews and surveys

label: Document Review
definition: Analysis of existing documents and records

label: Statistical Analysis
definition: Quantitative data analysis including market size projections

label: High Confidence
definition: Strong evidentiary basis; multiple corroborating sources

label: Verified
definition: Confirmed by subsequent events or independent sources
